text:
The Lapet Republic (, Rabe Kyōwakoku) is a location that's roughly the same size as Meteor City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 102 

Overview

The Lapet Republic is speculated to be around the same size as Meteor City (about 6,000 km²). 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The Mafia Hacker uses the Lapet Republic as a point of comparison when explaining the details about Meteor City to two Mafia members. He says that Meteor City's eight million residents are said to live in an area about the size of the Lapet Republic. 

Trivia

The Lapet Republic is about the size of the real-life Tokyo Metropolis (2,187.66 km²) plus Saitama Prefecture (3,798.08 km²) in Japan (approx. 5,985.74 km²/2,311.11 sq. mi.), as noted in the Japanese tankōbon. 

Translations around the World

References
